patternStatuses.name: candidate
patternStatuses.definition: Newly extracted pattern awaiting curation or repeated support.

patternStatuses.name: accepted
patternStatuses.definition: Curated pattern approved for normal retrieval and blueprint use.

patternStatuses.name: validated
patternStatuses.definition: Pattern has strong validation and can be preferred when query tags match.

patternStatuses.name: deprecated
patternStatuses.definition: Pattern should not be used for new blueprint generation.

patternStatuses.name: merged
patternStatuses.definition: Pattern was merged into another record and kept only for traceability.
